message:
feat: add getNode(), layout direction, sequence diagrams, and fix PNG export

- getNode(id): inspect node properties (label, type, color, dimensions)
- Layout direction: constructor/setDirection() for TB/LR/RL/BT, passed
  through WASM to Graphviz rankdir. fromMermaid() preserves direction.
- Sequence diagrams: addActor()/message() with formula layout, dashed
  lifelines, self-message loops. Pure TS, bypasses Graphviz.
- Fix PNG export: use Blob URL instead of data URI (broke on large SVGs)
- Fix arrow label collision detection: was completely dead after labels
  became free-standing (containerId=null). Now uses ID prefix matching
  and checks labels against arrow paths.
- Add architecture SVG to README
